scripts.build: npm run typecheck && STORY_PACKAGE=jojo vite build --outDir dist/jojo && STORY_PACKAGE=viral vite build --outDir dist/viral
scripts.build:jojo: npm run typecheck && STORY_PACKAGE=jojo vite build --outDir dist/jojo
scripts.build:ququ: npm run typecheck && rm -rf dist/ququ && STORY_PACKAGE=viral VITE_BASE_PATH=/ VITE_JOJO_APP_URL=/ding/ vite build --outDir dist/ququ && STORY_PACKAGE=jojo VITE_BASE_PATH=/ding/ VITE_VIRAL_APP_URL=/ vite build --outDir dist/ququ/ding
scripts.build:viral: npm run typecheck && STORY_PACKAGE=viral vite build --outDir dist/viral
scripts.build:fakechat: npm run typecheck && STORY_PACKAGE=viral VITE_BASE_PATH=/fakechat/ VITE_JOJO_APP_URL=https://ququ.mikeywa.icu/ding/ vite build --outDir dist/fakechat
scripts.build:ququ:viral: npm run typecheck && STORY_PACKAGE=viral VITE_BASE_PATH=/ VITE_JOJO_APP_URL=https://ququ.mikeywa.icu/ding/ vite build --outDir dist/ququ-viral
scripts.preview:jojo: npm run build:jojo && API_PORT=4173 DIST_DIR=dist/jojo SERVE_DIST=1 tsx server/index.ts
scripts.preview:viral: npm run build:viral && API_PORT=4174 DIST_DIR=dist/viral SERVE_DIST=1 tsx server/index.ts
scripts.preview:lan: npm run build:jojo && HOST=0.0.0.0 API_PORT=4173 DIST_DIR=dist/jojo SERVE_DIST=1 tsx server/index.ts
scripts.preview:lan:viral: npm run build:viral && HOST=0.0.0.0 API_PORT=4174 DIST_DIR=dist/viral SERVE_DIST=1 tsx server/index.ts
